name_en: Model: CE331 Coach Baguette STUDIO BAGUETTE. 20cm bottom size, the perfect charming length, and the height is just right for essentials like a phone, lipstick, and keys. Equipped with 2 detachable shoulder straps, an underarm strap and a casual crossbody strap. Classic style, simple silhouette. Solid colors are basic colors, matching any outfit. A versatile all-purpose style.
